entity: BBR source abbreviation SFW (San Francisco Warriors 1962-71) maps to warehouse canonical SF (San Francisco Warriors) and GSW (Golden State Warriors 1971+); same franchise, relocated/renamed 1971 (team_id 1610612744)

query_target.sql: SELECT (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612744' AND city = 'San Francisco' AND abbreviation = 'SF') AS sf_row_count, (SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) FROM dim_team WHERE team_id = '1610612744' AND city = 'Golden State' AND abbreviation = 'GSW') AS gsw_row_count

notes: Both SF (1962-71) and GSW (1971+) share team_id 1610612744 in dim_team, confirming the same franchise continued across the 1971 move from San Francisco to Oakland (and the rename to Golden State). The franchise started as the Philadelphia Warriors (PHW 1949-62), then San Francisco Warriors (SF/SFW 1962-71), then Golden State Warriors (GSW 1971+). The pre-SFW era is already covered by the team_identity.phw_to_phi fixture. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps counts as JSON numbers. NOTE: the task spec asked for `query_fn: getTeamIdentity` but no such function exists — using raw_sql per the existing team_identity fixture pattern.
